purpose: PG.06b FULL reduction: the complete NICER Vela-pulsar (PSR B0833-45 / J0835-4510) L2 archive, frozen BEFORE the bulk download. Source list: committed vela_observations.csv (fetch_nicer_vela.py, HEASARC nicermastr).

kernel_frozen.note: identical frozen object as PG.05/PG.07/PG.08; no refitted omega/eps permitted

vela_2019.source: JBO glitch catalogue row 23 (Kerr 2019; Lower+2020; Gugercinoglu+22; Grover+2024)

vela_2021.source: JBO glitch catalogue row 24 (Sosa-Fiscella+2021; Zubieta+2024; Grover+2024)

reduction_plan: STAGE 1: download L2 cl.evt + orb per obsid (resumable, retry); PINT-validated fast barycentre; per-obs H-test/Z^2 fold -> vela_nu_perobs_full.csv (mjd, f0, sigma_f0, H, n_photons, exposure)
SANITY GATE (hard stop): binned delta-nu(t) must reproduce the published glitch steps (2019: dnu/nu ~ 2.5e-6, 2021: ~1.26e-6, 2024: ~2.38e-6) before any comb statistic runs
STAGE 2: piecewise segment-coherent nu fits (documented fallback if full multi-month phase connection fails on timing noise) -> nu(t) recovery per glitch window
STAGE 3: frozen comb detector at omega on ln-tau recovery + off-kernel periodogram + within-segment shuffle + lambda battery (Bonferroni) + end-to-end injection (eps_90)
